mutation_of: Yandex match-3 / merge / sort dominance (Hexa Sort, Ball Sort, Block Dropping Merge, Watermelon Drop) — polarity inverted

idea.title: Anti-Match
idea.hook: Match-3 inverted — NEVER form a row of three same-color gems or the row explodes and crushes your column height. Survive 50 gravity drops with strategic anti-pattern.
idea.hook_ru: Перевёрнутая матч-3 — никогда не выстраивайте три камня одного цвета подряд, иначе колонка обрушится. Продержитесь 50 капель.
idea.prototype: 6-wide × 12-tall column grid. Gems drop from top one at a time, 4 colors. Player chooses column for each drop. If any horizontal/vertical 3-match forms after settle → those 3 gems EXPLODE and the column's effective height cap PERMANENTLY shrinks by 1 (gems above fall by gravity, potentially chaining). If any column hits its cap (default 12) = lose. 50-drop budget. Score = (50 − maxHeight) × 10 + emptyCells × 2 + dropsUsed × 5. Non-timer pressure: column height cap + drops budget + cap-shrink penalty.
idea.mutation_of: Inverts every Yandex match-3 / sort / merge trending signal (Hexa Sort Puzzle, Ball Sort Puzzle, Hexa Sort, Block Dropping Merge, Watermelon Drop on Poki). Adds Reddit 'The 11th Power' anti-pattern energy — they made 2048 into a roguelike deckbuilder; we make match-3 into a survival anti-puzzle.
idea.why_novel: ZERO games on these portals where matches are PUNISHMENTS. Every match-3 / merge / sort game rewards the same alignment instinct — players have a decade of muscle memory to overcome. Anti-Match weaponises that instinct: every reflex is now a trap. The cap-shrink penalty is the gut-punch — relief looks identical to disaster. High cognitive friction = high engagement.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Two stacking non-timer pressures + bonus penalty: (1) column height cap COL_HEIGHT_CAP = 12 — physical resource ceiling; (2) DROP_BUDGET = 50 — bounded moves budget, not timer; (3) every match permanently shrinks the affected column's cap by 1 (down to floor 3), so successful 'plays' silently erode buffer.
idea.lose_condition: Any column's settled height >= capPerCol[col] after a gem comes to rest. gs = 'GAMEOVER' immediately on commit. Reachable in ~30s of random play.

sources.title: Hexa Sort Puzzle / Block Dropping Merge / Hexa Sort
sources.snippet: Yandex casual category top trending — sort/merge mechanics dominate. Match-3 alignment instinct is universal, no inverted-polarity title exists.

sources.title: Watermelon Drop
sources.snippet: Poki popular-section merge-drop game. Drop-column merge pattern is the closest commercial analogue to Anti-Match's drop loop — same input verb, opposite scoring rule.

sources.title: The 11th Power — A 2048-inspired Roguelike Deckbuilder
sources.snippet: r/WebGames hot post (6 score, 2 comments). Pattern: take a beloved alignment-puzzle and invert / overload it with second-order systems. Anti-Match applies the same playbook to match-3 instead of 2048.

sources.title: Anti-Match idea proposal
sources.snippet: LLM-synthesised idea #5 from today's scan. Prototype + lose condition + non-timer pressure captured here, shipped as v0.1 with 6×12 grid, 50-drop budget, per-column cap-shrink penalty.

synthesizer_brief: Match-3 inverted into a survival puzzle. 6-wide × 12-tall grid, gems fall one at a time in 4 colours, player picks the column. Any 3-in-a-row of the same colour EXPLODES — gems vanish, gravity reflows, chain-detection re-runs, and the affected column(s) lose 1 unit of effective cap permanently (floor at 3). Win = survive 50 drops. Lose = any column hits its (shrinking) cap. Score formula rewards short stacks + empty board. Two stacking non-timer pressures: ceiling + drops budget. Visual identity: diamond-cut gems on a dark neon void, per-column dashed red threshold line, hard red death line at the top, shake + particle burst on every explosion to frame matches as punishment.

alternatives.title: Echo Cartographer
alternatives.hook: Ping unseen caves with sonar pulses and draw the map yourself by clicking where you THINK the walls are — earn points for accuracy, lose pings for guesses.
alternatives.mutation_of: Echo Locator inverted + r/WebGames 'Spark Relay' + Pixolve nonogram
alternatives.why_novel: No shipped game asks the player to be the cartographer — you commit predictions before knowing. Punishment for wrong marks creates pure deduction tension.

alternatives.title: Reverse Tycoon
alternatives.hook: You inherit a thriving cafe and must DEMOLISH it tile by tile to satisfy creditors — but each demolition kills customers whose tips were funding the next debt payment.
alternatives.mutation_of: Poki Monkey Mart / My Perfect Hotel tycoon dominance inverted
alternatives.why_novel: Every tycoon adds upward. Zero ship games where the loop is destruction-for-cash with synergy collapse penalties. Reverse-knapsack optimization.

alternatives.title: Mirror Match
alternatives.hook: Two armies on opposite sides of the board move in perfect mirror to your input — find the one move that lets your knight escape while the enemy mirror crashes into its own wall.
alternatives.mutation_of: r/WebGames 'Spark Relay' + Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe coupled moves + Crazygames Chaos Arena
alternatives.why_novel: No portal has a coupled-mirror-input puzzle. Asymmetric walls + shared input creates strategy from same-action / different-outcome.

alternatives.title: Wishlist Saboteur
alternatives.hook: You're a competitor's spy — drag your rival's Steam capsule features into the WRONG genre bucket to tank their algorithm placement before launch day.
alternatives.why_novel: Sabotage-tycoon-meta-gamedev hybrid. Risk/reward of bucket inspection creates bluff tension absent from straight-climb games.

alternatives.title: Customs Inspector
alternatives.hook: Stamp APPROVE or DENY on smuggler carts — but the contraband list changes every 5 carts and you only see the new list for 3 seconds before it hides.
alternatives.mutation_of: Papers-Please × telegram-digest 'Bot Patch' card-defense + Poki 'Who Is?'
alternatives.why_novel: No memory-deduction inspector on Yandex/Poki/Crazygames. Constraint isn't reaction — it's working-memory under uncertainty.
